description: ScrapingBee is a web scraping service that provides hosted APIs for fetching pages, search results, e-commerce data, screenshots, and AI-assisted extraction. It also offers an MCP server and CLI for connecting AI clients and automation workflows to those scraping capabilities.
summary: ScrapingBee exposes a credentialed HTTP API suite at `https://app.scrapingbee.com/api/v1`, a hosted remote MCP server at `https://mcp.scrapingbee.com/mcp`, and an npm-distributed `scrapingbee` CLI; all use a ScrapingBee API key.
